title: Protocol for Dissociation and Culture of Midbrain Astrocytes and Neurons
author: Elena Coccia
materials: Gently pipette up and down to dissociate cells.
Neutralize with 10 mL of complete medium.

steps.title: Dissociate midbrain astrocytes and neurons using TrypLE Select and Accutase
steps.instruction: Dissociate midbrain astrocytes and neurons using TrypLE Select and Accutase.

steps.title: Add TrypLE Select to the midbrain astrocyte culture
steps.instruction: Add TrypLE Select to the midbrain astrocyte culture.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes at room temperature. Count cells.

steps.title: Add of Accutase to the neuron culture
steps.instruction: Add of Accutase to the neuron culture.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 g for 5 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Pool the cells and plate into a 96-well plate
steps.instruction: Pool the cells and plate into a 96-well plate.

steps.title: Combine the resuspended astrocytes and neurons...
steps.instruction: Combine the resuspended astrocytes and neurons at a 5:1 ratio (100,000 neurons to 20,000 astrocytes).

steps.title: Mix gently and spin down again
steps.instruction: Mix gently and spin down again.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend into Geltrex...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend into Geltrex supplemented with 10µM of Y-27632, 10ng/ml CNTF, 20ng/ml BDNF, 20ng/ml GFNF. Aliquot 5 µL droplets into each well of the black 96-well plate.

steps.title: Allow droplets to polymerize at 37°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Allow droplets to polymerize at 37°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Fill each well with 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Fill each well with 100 µL of neuronal differentiation media supplemented with 10 ng/mL CNTF.
